Localization.Description: A repository is uploaded or downloaded via HTTP

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The repository "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} is downloaded via HTTP on host {event_src.host}
Failed to download the repository "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} via HTTP on host {event_src.host}
The repository "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} is uploaded via HTTP to host {event_src.host}
Failed to upload the repository "{object.name}" of the project {datafield2}/{datafield1} via HTTP to host {event_src.host}
